name: nucleotide-sequence
title: Nucleotide Sequence
description: A digital representation of a nucleotide sequence.
rdfs:comment: A digital representation of a nucleotide sequence.

fields.name: nucleotideSequence_pk
fields.title: Nucleotide Sequence (Primary Key)
fields.description: A unique identifier for a dwc:NucleotideSequence.
fields.comments: The value in this field MAY be changed in aggregation to guarantee uniqueness.
fields.rdfs:comment: An unambiguous reference to the resource within a given context.

fields.name: nucleotideSequenceID
fields.title: Nucleotide Sequence ID
fields.comments: The value in this field MUST be preserved in aggregation. Recommended best practice is to use a globally unique identifier.
fields.rdfs:comment: An unambiguous reference to the resource within a given context.

fields.name: sequence
fields.title: Sequence
fields.description: A string representing nucleotide base pairs.
fields.rdfs:comment: A string representing nucleotide base pairs.

fields.name: nucleotideSequenceRemarks
fields.title: Nucleotide Sequence Remarks
fields.description: Comments or notes about a dwc:NucleotideSequence.
fields.rdfs:comment: Comments or notes about a dwc:NucleotideSequence.
